# ccpool

> ccpool is a command-line tool for teams or households sharing a single Claude subscription, enabling fair token usage limits and coordinated access.

ccpool helps resolve token usage conflicts when multiple people share a single Claude subscription. Claude enforces a 5-hour rolling window and a weekly window limit. Without coordination, one member can easily exhaust the quota for everyone else. ccpool provides visibility and fair-share scheduling to prevent this.

## Documentation

- [Introduction](/docs): Learn what ccpool is, how it works, and its design philosophy.
- [Installation & Commands](/docs/installation): Comprehensive guide on installing ccpool and using CLI commands.
- [Privacy Policy](/docs/legal/privacy): Privacy policy regarding data collection and storage.
- [Terms of Service](/docs/legal/terms): Terms and conditions of using ccpool.
- [DMCA Policy](/docs/legal/dmca): DMCA policy and contact information.
